title: The Raid Turns Across Onigashima
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Law, Unknown person #13, Kid, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16 as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Reception Room, Castle Interior

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Once,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When Kaido was being held captive by the navy,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Vegapunk used his Lineage factor to try and synthesize an artificial devil fruit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world government intended to seize the fruit,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But it was ruled a failure...

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: So it was left on punk hazard.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: How is this relevant?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There was a massive explosion on punk hazard.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It would be conve- night if it was destroyed then,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But a report from G5 indicates that there was still a research facility in operation until recently.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was just thinking it's fortunate that the experiment was a failure.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That's all.

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: storeroom, behind the castle tower

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Who treated our wounds?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...I don't know.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I vaguely remember catching a glimpse of a familiar face... but it had to be a dream.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: There's just NO WAY IT WAS REAL...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Luffy- Dono!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He stepped up to fight Kaido in our stead....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the rest of the island is still at war!! Let's go!! We still have some fight left in us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys look like you've taken a beating!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was hoping our paths would cross again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You've all aged quite a bit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: WAHA MANAMA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Break next week.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: However, I don't

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Oden- Sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: They can't believe their eyes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: This Oden?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Dison away!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I shall cross to a new riverbank!! Wherever the sun sets, that shall be my bed!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Ahh, I'm hungry now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The mountain god incident happened when open was just 18 years old...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oden from the flashback as we know him.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 37 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
